Tests the `toFixed` method of `Number.prototype` for a specific case.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `toFixed` method on the `Number` prototype in JavaScript. It verifies that calling `toFixed` with an argument of `0` on the number `0` returns the string `"0"`. This test ensures that the `toFixed` method correctly formats a number to a string with zero decimal places. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating the output of a single method under a specific condition.
